_comment: Slovene function-word policy. POS-first: 'pos' lists the classla UPOS tags that count as function words (the primary signal when an analyzer is present) — this catches the whole biti AUX paradigm (sem/si/je/smo/ste/so) without enumerating surfaces, which is why 'biti' the lemma and ste/smo/so are deliberately NOT in 'include'. 'include' force-adds words POS misses or mistags: the open-class adverbs kje/kako/tam (UD ADV) and 'ni' (classla tags it VERB, not AUX). It is also the SOLE signal under the lowercase fallback (no analyzer -> upos empty). 'exclude' force-removes. 'include' seeded 2026-05-12 from curriculum 'arrival-in-ljubljana-5f8c0f52', manually curated (see build_function_word_list.py).
